seoTitle: Swan Marsh vs Swan Reach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Swan Marsh and Swan Reach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Swan Marsh vs Swan Reach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swan Marsh and Swan Reach.
heading: Swan Marsh vs Swan Reach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swan Marsh, Victoria and Swan Reach, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swan Reach has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Swan Marsh (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swan Marsh or Swan Reach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swan Marsh has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Swan Reach scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swan Marsh scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Swan Reach scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swan Marsh or Swan Reach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swan Reach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
